reviews.review_description: Had to refund even though It was so cheap as I couldn't understand as it's not in English. It jumps right into the game without a tutorial and the instructions are crudely written. Mahjong is a group game yet this is only a single player which I found odd. Multiplayer would be so much more playable. The graphics are babyish. Please please someone make a proper Mahjong game in multiplayer.

developer_response.body: More gameplay features have been added, welcome to try them out.
